creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Wed Dec 18 18:58:09 2013
New Revision: 336857
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336857

Log:
  - Update from 1.3.0 to 1.3.1
  - Add pkgconfig to USES
  
  PR:		ports/184853
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Added:
  head/audio/quimup/files/
  head/audio/quimup/files/patch-src__qm_itemlist.h   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/audio/quimup/Makefile
  head/audio/quimup/distinfo

Modified: head/audio/quimup/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/quimup/Makefile	Wed Dec 18 18:57:48 2013	(r336856)
+++ head/audio/quimup/Makefile	Wed Dec 18 18:58:09 2013	(r336857)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	quimup
-PORTVERSION=	1.3.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.3.1
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/musicpd/Quimup/${PORTVERSION}
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}_${PORTVERSION}_src
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	libmpdclient.so:${PORTSDIR}
 
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}_${PORTVERSION}
 
-USES=		qmake
+USES=		pkgconfig qmake
 USE_QT4=	corelib gui network \
 		moc_build rcc_build uic_build
 

Modified: head/audio/quimup/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/quimup/distinfo	Wed Dec 18 18:57:48 2013	(r336856)
+++ head/audio/quimup/distinfo	Wed Dec 18 18:58:09 2013	(r336857)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (quimup_1.3.0_src.tar.gz) = 9a3a93285c66ffa96b3c66399ec9ac88b7d5ecf2559a868dca93a08158a3bae5
-SIZE (quimup_1.3.0_src.tar.gz) = 245760
+SHA256 (quimup_1.3.1_src.tar.gz) = 4f125a2bc913b2946c98ecc94929e2a30c12dd201d55772b06473cb4a941bf8a
+SIZE (quimup_1.3.1_src.tar.gz) = 239578

Added: head/audio/quimup/files/patch-src__qm_itemlist.h
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/quimup/files/patch-src__qm_itemlist.h	Wed Dec 18 18:58:09 2013	(r336857)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- src/qm_itemlist.h.orig
++++ src/qm_itemlist.h
+@@ -63,7 +63,7 @@
+     QString sorter;
+ 
+     // Override the < operator for alist.sort();
+-    bool operator < (const qm_listitemInfo& litem)
++    bool operator < (const qm_listitemInfo& litem) const
+     {
+         return sorter < litem.sorter;
+     }
